stories.title: World Cup live updates: Chaotic own goal pads Port...
NFL nixes 2026 supplemental draft; Sorsby stuck
stories.summary: The NFL has decided not to hold a supplemental draft this year, effectively halting Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's path to the league this season.

stories.title: Ronaldo snaps goal drought, 1st to score at 6 WCs
stories.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has become the first player to score a goal in six different World Cup tournaments.

stories.title: Tiger makes first public appearance since arrest
stories.summary: Tiger Woods made his first public appearance since his arrest in late March when he introduced CEO Brian Rolapp during a PGA Tour news conference Tuesday at TPC River Highlands in Connecticut.

stories.title: Blazers hiring Wolves' Nori as coach, sources say
stories.summary: The Trail Blazers have hired Micah Nori as the team's new head coach. Nori has spent the past five seasons as an assistant coach for the Wolves.
